CAVEATS / implementer-defined:
1) The "Promotion" response schema (line 32491) has NO standalone JSON example in the doc, only a property table listing promotionConfigurationWarnings (String[]), promotionDetails (Unified Promotions Output[]), rules (Template Configuration[]). The promotionDetails array element in the fixture is the verbatim documented "Unified Promotions" output JSON example (line 33409). The rules array element is SYNTHESIZED from the Template Configuration property-table field names (line 33044): event Configuration -> rendered as eventConfiguration (doc shows spaced label "event Configuration" due to PDF column wrap; exact JSON key not shown in any example), reward Configuration -> rewardConfiguration, journalSubTypeName, ruleName, templateName, journalType, journalSubType, priority. Casing of eventConfiguration/rewardConfiguration is INFERRED, no JSON example exists to confirm. Flag for implementer to verify against a live org.
2) The request JSON example at line 24204 is truncated/page-broken in the source (e.g. eligibleChannels show "***" placeholders, eligibleCampaign/eligibleLoyaltyPartnerProducts/eligibleCoupons appear with empty strings); I trimmed the all-placeholder branches and kept the well-formed fields. rules in the requestExample left as [] because the doc's request example does not include a rules payload sample (only the property table names the type Unified Promotion Template Input[]).
3) No error/empty fixture provided, the doc shows no error response example for this resource.
4) The request "Properties" table (line 24335) lists promotion-level fields (additionalFieldValues, businessUnit, currencyIsoCode, description, displayName, endDateTime, isAutomatic, ...) that belong INSIDE promotionDetails; the nesting matches the JSON example.
